neuro.title: Motion Bias
neuro.label: More Attention
neuro.back: Human visual cortex detects movement automatically. Moving rickshaw ads command 400% more attention than static billboards.

neuro.title: Pattern Interruption
neuro.label: Memory Encoding
neuro.back: New ad breaks expected patterns, triggering norepinephrine release and encoding into memory.

neuro.title: Spaced Repetition
neuro.label: Consolidation
neuro.back: Same ad on different rickshaws across days = 3x memory consolidation via spacing effect.

neuro.title: Visual Recall
neuro.label: Recall Rate
neuro.back: 65% of visual info recalled after 3 days vs 10% text. Transit ads use dual encoding.

neuro.title: Location Familiarity
neuro.label: Trust Increase
neuro.back: Ads in familiar locations feel trustworthy. Mere-exposure effect builds community connection.

neuro.title: Social Proof
neuro.label: Word-of-Mouth
neuro.back: Thousands seeing same ad = implicit social proof. Drives word-of-mouth and credibility.

neuro.title: Dual-Channel
neuro.label: Higher Recall
neuro.back: Audio + Visual = two memory pathways. 85% higher recall than visual-only transit ads.

neuro.title: Community
neuro.label: Prefer Local
neuro.back: 73% prefer brands that feel local. Transit ads create neighborhood ownership and trust.

faq.q: How are Eye Views different from Impressions?
faq.a: Eye Views track verified human visual contact based on foot traffic and viewing angles. Unlike digital impressions (server requests), Eye Views measure real attention. Average: 11,500 Eye Views per rickshaw daily.

4 strategic routes: (1) Mumbra→Kausa→MM Valley Road (2) Mumbra→Kausa→Kalsekar Bypass→Shilphata→Kalyan Phata→Taloja Phase 1&2 (3) Mumbra→Retibunder→Kalwa Naka (4) Mumbra→Retibunder→Check Naka→Majhiwada. 600+ rickshaws across 12 zones.
Prices range ₹1,238-₹1,647/day per rickshaw, changing every 15 minutes based on demand. 10% discount on 10+ rickshaws.
LED Display, Audio Announcement, and LED+Audio Combo. Book any LED/Combo and get 30 FREE social media creatives.

faq.q: How do I track my campaign?
faq.a: Real-time dashboard: Eye Views, Impressions, Reach, GPS routes, daily reports.
48-72 hours from booking. We handle creative production, installation, GPS setup. Call +91 95943 06625.

faq.q: How does RASAAI compare to digital ads?
faq.a: 0% skip rate (vs 76% YouTube), 68% brand recall (vs 18% digital), ₹4.50 CPM (vs ₹35-150 Instagram).
Yes! Select from 4 routes and 12 zones. Target school zones, market areas, station queues, or industrial corridors.
